itinerary.title: Khanvel Scenic Green Retreat
itinerary.tagline: Khanvel Scenic Green Retreat & Silvassa Escape
itinerary.overview:
Escape into an oasis of lush woodlands, rolling meadows, and pristine waterscapes. This exclusive weekend getaway, meticulously crafted by TRAGUIN travel specialists, offers a high-end luxury retreat to Khanvel and Silvassa. Unwind amid breathtaking landscapes, indulge in premium stays nestled within verdant forests, and gather unforgettable memories.

The Best Dadra and Nagar Haveli Tour Package is carefully organized for those seeking a stylish, refreshing break away from bustling city life. Managed with flawless attention to detail by TRAGUIN experts, this tour combines exquisite leisure with curated local insights.

TRAGUIN Curated Touch: Handpicked resort cottages, private boat chartering at Dudhni, and custom-timed sunset highlights.

Why Visit Dadra and Nagar Haveli: A perfect blend of sprawling forest reserves, Portuguese architecture, cascading lakes, and a relaxing tropical climate. Famous Attractions: Khanvel Forest Lodge, Vasona Lion Safari, Dudhni Jet Jetty, Swaminarayan Temple, and Nakshatra Garden. Most Searched Experiences: Premium wildlife spotting, private speed-boating across Madhuban Dam waters, and exploring authentic Warli tribal art. Best Time to Visit Dadra and Nagar Haveli: Winter months from November to March provide optimal weather, boasting refreshing breezes and beautifully lush, green post-monsoon foliage.
itinerary.seo_title: DN-007 | Khanvel Scenic Green Retreat | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 02 Nights / 03 Days Khanvel retreat package (DN-007 / TG-DN-007-LUX): Swaminarayan Temple, Nakshatra Garden, Vasona Lion Safari, Dudhni Waterfront, Tribal Cultural Museum, and 4-tier hotels.

highlights.text: Vasona Lion Safari & Dudhni Waterfront with private speed-boat
Tribal Cultural Museum & Local Craft Center
TRAGUIN Signature Experience: Private speed-boating at Dudhni and exclusive Lion Safari viewing decks
Curated by TRAGUIN Experts: Handpicked luxury stays emphasizing peaceful green surroundings
Luxury Transportation: Highly sanitized premium vehicles with experienced local drivers

days.title: Arrival & Silvassa Impressions to Khanvel Retreat
days.description: Your luxury weekend begins with a private pickup from Vapi Railway Station or Surat Airport by our professional chauffeur. Step into your premium vehicle and enjoy a smooth transfer into the green territories of Silvassa. Our first stop is the beautiful, intricately carved Swaminarayan Temple, followed by a relaxed walk through the lush Nakshatra Garden, filled with medicinal plants and artistic fountains. Afterward, take a scenic drive into Khanvel, a tranquil paradise surrounded by dense forests. Check into your ultra-luxury nature resort. As evening sets in, enjoy the premium amenities, relax by the pool, or enjoy a tranquil nature walk inside the property to collect unforgettable memories under a starry sky.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Silvassa Swaminarayan Temple, Nakshatra Garden
Evening Experience: Leisure time at resort, poolside fine dining
Overnight Stay: Khanvel (Luxury Nature Resort Stay)

days.title: Vasona Lion Safari & Private Dudhni Lake Excursion
days.description: Start your day with a delicious breakfast looking out over the misty canopy of Khanvel. Today, we experience the top wildlife attraction of the territory—the Vasona Lion Safari. Board a secured luxury safari vehicle to see the majestic Asiatic lions roaming in their natural forest habitat. Next, we head further down to Dudhni, often called the 'Kashmir of the West' due to its vast, scenic waterfront created by the Madhuban Dam. TRAGUIN has curated an exclusive speed-boat experience across the vast lake, surrounded by rolling hills. Capture incredible photographs from the water before returning to Khanvel to relax. Treat yourself to a premium spa session or a cozy evening bonfire curated especially for you.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Vasona Lion Safari, Dudhni Waterfront, Madhuban Dam backwaters
Exclusive Experiences: Private chartered speed-boat ride at Dudhni Jetty

days.title: Tribal Heritage Tour & Smooth Departure
days.description: After a relaxing breakfast, check out of your luxury resort. Before concluding your tour, we visit the Silvassa Tribal Cultural Museum, which showcases a unique collection of traditional masks, musical instruments, hunting tools, and iconic Warli paintings. This provides a great cultural highlight to your trip. Spend some time picking up local handicrafts as souvenirs. Finally, your chauffeur will provide a smooth transfer back to Vapi or Surat for your onward journey, marking the completion of your premium curated vacation.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Tribal Cultural Museum, Local Craft Center
Photography Points: Traditional Warli artwork walls
